fields.name: THE DERMA CO
fields.description: 1 Hyaluronic Sunscreen Oil Free Gel Lightweight Sunscreen Acne Prone Skin | 50.0 gm

fields.name: DECONSTRUCT Lightweight Gel Sunscreen- Spf 50 Pa | 50.0 gm
fields.description: Keep your skin safe from the harsh sun with the Deconstruct Lightweight Gel Sunscreen SPF 55+. This hydrating sun protection cream has broad spectrum SPF 55+ and PA+++ to shield the skin from the harsh sun rays. It has a lightweight, water-resistant formula that absorbs quickly without leaving any white cast.

fields.name: Sunscreen For Bright Skin SPF 50 PA Water Light Niacinamide In Vivo Tested | 50.0 ml
fields.description: Choose Lakme Sun Expert - your daily sunscreen lotion which is light enough to be used all year round. Suitable for all skin types - this lightweight lotion provides broad spectrum UV protection. SPF 50 blocks upto 97% harmful rays of UVB which causes sunburns & PA+++ shields from UVA rays which cause dark spots, premature ageing and skin darkening. Pick this travel friendly pack of 50 ml wherever you go. What are you waiting for - grab the best protection under the sun and say goodbye to sun damage!

fields.name: Women UV Plus SPF50 Rosy Glow Sunscreen | 30.0 ml
fields.description: Keep your skin glowing and shielded all day long with the clarins uv plus [3p] spf50 rosy glow. Specifically formulated for asian skin, this lightweight sunscreen feels non-greasy and keeps your skin protected from harmful sun rays. The clarins sunscreen contains plant extracts to nourish and refresh your skin.

fields.name: The Therapy Vegan Moisturizing Sun Serum | 50.0 ml
fields.description: Elevate your skincare routine with the The Face Shop The Therapy Vegan Moisturizing Sun Serum. This SPF 50 sun serum, containing edelweiss and thyme extracts, offers protection from sun damage. This vegan sun serum deeply nourishes your skin without weighing it down, keeping the skin supple and reducing premature signs of aging.

fields.name: Ultra Sheer Dry Touch Suncream SPF 50 | 30.0 gm
fields.description: Oil-free sunscreen cream provides a non-greasy feel water-resistant sunscreen does not wash off easily non-comedogenic cream gives spotless skin dermatologically tested cream for safe use

fields.name: Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence | 100.0 ml
fields.description: The viral COSRX Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence is a lightweight essence enriched with 96% Snail Secretion Filtrate which nourishes, repairs and revitalises skin for dewy, glass skin. Snail Mucin is highly effective at improving skin elasticity and maintaining hydration levels all day long.

fields.name: Dragon Fruit Bounce Sunscreen
fields.description: In-Vivo Tested SPF 50+ PA++++, With New-Age UV Filters, Lightweight, Cushion-Gel Texture, Fast-Absorbing, Niacinamide Infused, Broad Spectrum Protection

fields.name: Muuchstac Ocean Face Wash for Men
fields.description: Muuchstac Ocean Face Wash for Men (2 x 100ml) – Anti-Acne/Pimple, Oil Control & Skin Brightening Cleanser – with Niacinamide, Menthol & Licorice Extracts – For All Skin Types

fields.name: Joy Skin Fruits Lemon Brightening Face Wash
fields.description: Joy Skin Fruits Lemon Brightening Face Wash 150ml x 2 | with Vitamin C for Glowing Skin | Reduces Dark Spots, Removes Excess Oil & Dirt | For Normal to Oily Skin

fields.name: Brightening Sunscreen
fields.description: Deconstruct Fluid Brightening Sunscreen SPF 50+ PA++++ |Sunscreen with Niacinamide| Brightens Skin | Dewy finish| Gives glow| Lightweight, Quick absorb |For dry, oily,combination, normal skin |For Men

fields.name: The Body Shop Vitamin E Moisture Cream 50 Ml
fields.description: Lightweight and fast absorbing Replenishes skin moisture and vital hydration Skin looks healthier and hydrated for 48hrs Enriched with hydrating, natural-origin hyaluronic acid, vitamin E and raspberry seed oil Infused with our comforting Vitamin E scent Suitable for all skin types Dermatologically tested

fields.name: Perfect Radiance Brightening Facewash
fields.description: PERFECT RADIANT: Lakme Perfect Radiance Facewash is designed to give your skin an illuminated glow. Enriched with 98% Pure Niacinamide Complex, it smoothens your skin texture and cleanse your skin

fields.name: Oil & Acne Control Face Wash
fields.description:
Powered by Salicylic Acid, Niacinamide & Cica, this face wash goes beyond basic cleansing. It unclogs pores, fades dark spots, calms inflammation, and gently exfoliates dull skin — all while keeping your skin barrier intact with Hyaluronic Acid. No stripping. No dryness. Just visibly cleaner, brighter skin from the very first wash. 
Sulphate-free · Paraben-free · pH-friendly · Soap-free · Dermatologically tested · Safe for sensitive skin

fields.name: Korean Double Duty Cleanser
fields.description: Multifunctional 2-in-1 Makeup Remover + Facewash: 2-in-1 Korean formula including makeup remover + facewash that removes makeup, dirt, SPF in one step. Perfect for minimalists and skincare lover

fields.name: Hydrating Gentle Skin Cleanser
fields.description: CETAPHIL GENTLE SKIN CLEANSER: Clinically proven to cleanse while hydrating, providing 48 hours of hydration when wiped off versus rinsing
